title: FluidCam
description: FluidCam is a Fabric mod that smooths out camera and mouse movement, making PvP and general gameplay feel more fluid and responsive.
body:
FluidCam is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that improves the feel of camera and mouse movement. In vanilla Minecraft, camera rotation snaps instantly to wherever your mouse moves, which can feel jarring and rough — especially during fast-paced PvP or when trying to aim precisely.
FluidCam fixes this by adding smooth camera interpolation. Instead of the camera jumping directly to your mouse position, it glides naturally and fluidly, giving your gameplay a much more polished and cinematic feel without sacrificing responsiveness.
### Features:

Smooth camera interpolation for fluid mouse movement
Works in both PvP and regular gameplay
Extremely lightweight — no performance impact
Client-side only — works on any server

### Installation:

Install Fabric Loader for your Minecraft version
Drop the FluidCam .jar into your mods folder
Launch and enjoy smoother gameplay!

### Compatibility:

Multiple Minecraft versions supported
Requires Fabric Loader
Compatible with Sodium and other performance mods
